titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Sam Kim Collection
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Fantasia Thorne

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 8, 2018 at 00:01

did.abstract: The collection showcases the wide variety of materials designed by Sam Kim, including annual reports, corporate stationery, greeting cards, bumper stickers, and T-shirts.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of the Yale School of Art.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Sam Kim Collection, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Sam Kim graduated from the Yale School of Art Graphic Design program, Class of 1964. He worked in Hawaii from 1964 to 1977. Upon Kim's death, the Yale School of Art organized a retrospective exhibition with examples of Kim's work selected by his classmates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection showcases the wide variety of materials designed by Kim, including annual reports, corporate stationery, greeting cards, bumper stickers, and T-shirts.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged in two series: I. Clients, 1966-1977. II. Personal, 1969-1978.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by the name of the client.

did.unittitle: Center for Korean Studies at the University of Hawaii
